name: Pomodoro Timer
description: Focus timer using the Pomodoro technique. Configurable focus and break durations, session tracking, and background phase detection.
author: Asyar

preferences.name: focusMinutes
preferences.title: Focus duration
preferences.description: Length of a focus session in minutes (5–60).

preferences.name: shortBreakMinutes
preferences.title: Short break
preferences.description: Length of a short break in minutes (1–15).

preferences.name: longBreakMinutes
preferences.title: Long break
preferences.description: Length of a long break in minutes (10–30).

preferences.name: sessionsBeforeLongBreak
preferences.title: Sessions before long break
preferences.description: Number of focus sessions before a long break kicks in (1–8).

preferences.name: autoStartBreaks
preferences.title: Auto-start breaks
preferences.description: Automatically start the next break when a focus session ends.

preferences.name: autoStartFocus
preferences.title: Auto-start focus
preferences.description: Automatically start the next focus session when a break ends.

actions.title: Copy Session Summary
actions.description: Copy today's Pomodoro summary to clipboard

actions.title: Learn About Pomodoro
actions.description: Open the Pomodoro Technique on Wikipedia

commands.name: Start Pomodoro
commands.description: Start a focus session and close the launcher

commands.name: Pomodoro Timer
commands.description: Open the timer view with live countdown

commands.name: Pomodoro Tick
commands.description: Background tick that advances the timer and fires phase-end notifications when the iframe is suspended
